name: S3 Bucket Name Length Check
description: This custom rule ensures S3 bucket names are not longer than 32 characters to follow AWS best practices
remediationNotes: If this rule is violated, please follow these steps: 1. Go to AWS S3 console 2. Navigate to the bucket with the long name 3. Consider renaming the bucket to a shorter name (max 32 characters) 4. Update any references to the old bucket name in your applications 5. Note: Renaming S3 buckets requires creating a new bucket and copying data

event.type: S3 bucket name is longer than 32 characters
